ops.title: cookiesync union pulls time out on the yasyf-home peer; abwc daemon wedges leave stale ~/.agent-browser sockets — use --browser arc and clean .sock files
ops.body:
On this machine (2026-07-14), `abwc-seed` failed repeatedly: `cookiesync cookies` (union mode) timed out (status 124) waiting on the unreachable peer `yasyf@yasyf-home.tail71af5d.ts.net`, and the agent-browser daemon wedged with `os error 35`. Fixes that worked, in order:

1. `cookiesync doctor` — a "key cache degraded after a Secure Enclave presence refusal" needs a fresh `cookiesync auth` tap.
2. Skip the peer union: `cookiesync cookies <url> --browser arc` returns in ~3 s.
3. A wedged agent-browser daemon survives `pkill` via stale session files — remove `~/.agent-browser/ab-<session>*.{sock,pid,stream,engine,version}` too.
4. Seed by hand: dump storageState to a mode-600 scratchpad file (`umask 077`), `ab --local --session <s> state load <file>`, delete the file, then `ab open <url>`. Avoid the FIFO variant — `state load` on a FIFO wedges the daemon.
